titleStmt.title: SII 31.64: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 64. (A.R. No. B 321 of 1936.) PĀLAGIRI, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Chennakēśava temple.
It is dated Śaka 1426 (wrong for 1425) Ruthirō[dgāri], Kārtīka, śu. 12, Sunday, corresponding to November 1, Wednesday (not Sunday), 1503 A.D.

It registers the gift of lands situated at the villages Sānttamaḍa. Vupparamōḷḷa, Animela to the temple of Chennakēśavarāya at Pālagiri situated in the Mulikinānḍu by Kāmarasu Timmayaṁgāru for the daily worship of the god. The gifts are stated to have been made for the merit of the king Narasanāṁkavoḍayalu in the presence of god Viṭṭhaladēva, on the bank of the river Tungabhadra, on the occasion of Vutthāna dvādasi. The village Pālagiri is stated to have given as a fief (māgāṇi) to Kāmarasu Timmayagāru by Narasanāyakavoḍayalu. It also registers the gifts of land by [Rāchirāju] yaṟam Timmaya to the same temple for the merit of Raya and Narasanāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avighnamastu .
śrījayābhyudhaya
śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1426 Āgunēṁṭi rudhirōdgāri sa
ṁvatsara kā¨rttika su 12 A . śrī
mahāmaṁḍalēśvaramēdinī mīsaraga
ṁḍḍa kaṭhāri sāḷuva sāḷuva
ma mahārāyala komā
ruḍu yimmaḍi narasiṁgarāya ma
hārāyalu vijayanagara siṁhāsanā
di pradhivīrājyamu śāyaṁgānu Ārā
tanāyaṁkuṁḍaina narasānāya ku
ḍu rājyabhārakuṁḍai rājyamu
gānu śrīmatu śrīpālagiri cannakēśava
rāyaniki kāmarusu timayyaṁgāru yiccina
śāsanakramameṭlananu narasānāyaṁka voḍaya
luṁgāru māku māgi(gā)ṇiki pāliṁcina mulikināṁṭi lō
pālagirini cennakēśavarāyaniki dhūpadīpa (ni)ve(vē)da(dyā)
raṁga vaibhavālaku tuṁgabhadhrānadītīramaṁdu viṭhaladēvu
sannidhini vuddānadvādaśi puṇyakālamaṁddunu rāya
nu narasunāyaṁka voḍayalakunnu puṇyamugānu
vośi sinacīmasaṁtta maḍastaḷā na kha 17 vupparamōḷla
navubhayaṁ kha 2 pū¨rvāna rāya dattaṁ Animela
namaḍa khaṁ ... na ciṁtalatōṭa Þ 1 n vubhayaṁ khaṁ ... 1
najuyaratimmayyaṁgāru Amṛta paḷaku nama¨rppistā
kāriṁ polamēra Āṟuṁgaḍa kha Þ 1 n Animela tiruvu
ku varalekha 84 Akṣarālānu AIdu vuṭlu naṁ
mu cēnikinni nidhi nikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa Akṣiṇa Āgā
siddha sādhyaṁbula niyadu Aṣṭabhōga tējasvāmyamu
nu . Ācaṁdrā¨rkkastāIgānu rāyalakusnu narasānāya
ka voḍayalaṁgārikinni puṇyamugānu cellaṁgaladhi .
dattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ paradattā
pahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . dānapālanayō
cchrēyōnupālanaṁ dānāsva¨rgamavāpnōti vā
svadattaṁ padaṁ . svadattaṁvā paradattāṁ vāyōha
darā ṣaṣṭhi¨rva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatēkrimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 31.64 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
